name: task
description: An Electron application with Vue and TypeScript

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:node && npm run typecheck:web
scripts.postinstall: npm run install:electron && node scripts/electron-mirror-env.mjs npx electron-builder install-app-deps
scripts.build:unpack: npm run build:sandbox && npm run build && node scripts/electron-mirror-env.mjs electron-builder --dir
scripts.build:win: npm run build:sandbox && npm run build && node scripts/electron-mirror-env.mjs electron-builder --win
scripts.build:mac: npm run build:sandbox && npm run build && node scripts/electron-mirror-env.mjs electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:linux: npm run build:sandbox && npm run build && node scripts/electron-mirror-env.mjs electron-builder --linux
scripts.package:smoke: npm run build:sandbox && npm run build && node scripts/electron-mirror-env.mjs electron-builder --linux --dir
scripts.build:native: cargo build --release -p codeteam-sandbox -p codeteam-windows-sandbox -p codeteam-linux-sandbox --manifest-path native/Cargo.toml
scripts.build:native:debug: cargo build -p codeteam-sandbox -p codeteam-windows-sandbox -p codeteam-linux-sandbox --manifest-path native/Cargo.toml
scripts.build:sandbox: npm run build:native && npm run copy-helpers && npm install --prefix native/codeteam-sandbox && npm run build --prefix native/codeteam-sandbox
scripts.build:sandbox:debug: npm run build:native:debug && npm run copy-helpers && npm install --prefix native/codeteam-sandbox && npm run build:debug --prefix native/codeteam-sandbox
scripts.test:providers:light: npm run test:codex:light -- --case static --skip-live --role all && npm run test:cursor:light -- --case static --skip-live && npm run test:claude:light -- --case static --skip-live && npm run test:opencode:light -- --case static --skip-live
scripts.test:unit: node --import ./tests/tsx-tsconfig.mjs --import tsx --test tests/agent-runtime/*.test.ts tests/auth/*.test.ts tests/conversation/*.test.ts tests/db/*.test.ts tests/events/*.test.ts tests/jobs/*.test.ts tests/mcp/*.test.ts tests/retention/*.test.ts tests/shared/*.test.ts tests/threads/*.test.ts tests/wizard/*.test.ts tests/sandbox/*.test.mjs tests/sandbox/*.test.ts
scripts.test:fast: node scripts/ensure-node-native.mjs && npm run test:unit && npm run test:provider-contract && npm run test:workflow
scripts.test:ci: npm run typecheck && npm run test:fast
scripts.release:test-gate: npm run typecheck && npm run typecheck:control-plane && npm run check:control-plane-types && npm run check:legacy-write-guard && npm run check:no-double-assertions && npm run lint && npm run test:fast && npm run test:control-plane
scripts.test:sandbox:all: npm run test:sandbox:tdd && npm run test:sandbox && npm run test:sandbox:v2 && npm run test:sandbox:attachments
